name: BEA Systems, Inc.
description: BEA Systems, Inc. was an enterprise software company that specialized in enterprise infrastructure software products. The company's product line consisted of WebLogic, an enterprise application server; Tuxedo, an enterprise transaction processing monitor; and AquaLogic, a service-oriented architecture (SOA) infrastructure product suite. Founded in 1995 and headquartered in San Jose, California, BEA Systems was a major player in the middleware market before being acquired by Oracle Corporation in 2008 for approximately $8.5 billion.
